info.title: FortiManager JSON API Documentation
info.description:
Documentation for FortiManager JSON API, ADOM version 6.2

Policy package manages the different types of policies in device VDOM. All configuration will be copied onto the device during next install.

  • Prefix /pm/pkg/global/ and /pm/pkg/adom/ are used to access or modify the packages and install targets at global or ADOM level.
  • Prefix /pm/config/global/pkg/ and /pm/config/adom/pkg/ are used to access policies inside a package.
  • Prefix /pm/pblock/adom/ and /pm/config/adom/pblock/ are use to configure policy block and policy inside policy block.

This list only contains the policies. All objects that are reference by the policies are shared among the packages, and are listed under ADOM Level Objects.

tags.name: /pm/config/firewall/consolidated/policy
tags.description:
Configure consolidated IPv4/IPv6 policies. When configuring policy within policy package, use (/pm/config/adom/pkg/).
When configuring policy for a policy block, use (/pm/config/adom/pblock/).

params.cdb.get.obj.option.opts.description:
Set fetch option for the request. If no option is specified, by default the attributes of the object will be returned.
scope member - Return a list of scope members along with other attributes.
chksum - Return the check-sum value instead of attributes.
datasrc - Return all objects that can be referenced by an attribute. Require attr parameter.

params.cdb.get.table.option.opts.description:
Set fetch option for the request. If no option is specified, by default the attributes of the objects will be returned.
count - Return the number of matching entries instead of the actual entry data.
scope member - Return a list of scope members along with other attributes.
datasrc - Return all objects that can be referenced by an attribute. Require attr parameter.
get reserved - Also return reserved objects in the result.
syntax - Return the attribute syntax of a table or an object, instead of the actual entry data. All filter parameters will be ignored.
